items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of waiting for sold-out group events.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the persona scenario regarding waitlisting for sold-out group events. However, the evidence provided does not confirm the functionality of the waitlist with priority bidding or any specific outcomes related to the scenario. While there is evidence of customers entering a waitlist, it does not address the expected result of confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report, leading to an inconclusive status.
